title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm out with Tokai Teio...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Claw machines! Don't they look fun?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, and that one's filled with plush Cuties!
They're super popular right now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio points toward a claw machine filled
with Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Heh, truth be told, I don't just shine at arcade
dancing games. I'm incredible at these too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
What about you? Are you any good at claw
machines?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Really? All right then, let's see what you got!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
